basic_details.job_title: ICMR NICPR Young Professional Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Cancer Prevention and Research
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Cancer Prevention and Research (ICMR NICPR) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Young Professional-III (F&A) Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Online through the official ICMR NICPR website. The last date to submit the application form is 27-07-2026.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Not more than 40 Years as on the date of Interview.
age_limit.details: The maximum age limit for candidates is not more than 40 years as on the date of the interview. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Com / MBA (minimum 55% marks) or CA (Inter)/ICWA (Inter)/CS (Inter) with minimum five years of post-qualification experience.
qualification.details: Young Professional-III (F&A): M.Com / MBA (With minimum 55% marks) from a recognized University/College or CA (Inter)/ICWA (Inter)/CS (Inter) with a minimum of five years of post-qualification experience in the relevant field/subject.

salary_details.details: Consolidated emoluments of Rs.50,000/- p.m. No House Rent Allowance (HRA) will be paid.

selection_process: Screening based on Google Form entries Walk-in Interview/Written Test (if more than 30 candidates) Interview/Personal Discussion
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 27-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of ICMR NICPR to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: ICMR NICPR Young Professional-III (F&A) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the ICMR NICPR Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download ICMR NICPR Young Professional-III (F&A) Job 2026 Notification PDF

ICMR NICPR Young Professional-III (F&A) Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Young Professional-III (F&A): M.Com / MBA (With minimum 55% marks) from a recognized University/College or CA (Inter)/ICWA (Inter)/CS (Inter) with a minimum of five years of post-qualification experience in the relevant field/subject.

content_sections.heading: ICMR NICPR Young Professional-III (F&A) Application Fee 2026
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: ICMR NICPR Young Professional-III (F&A) Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: The maximum age limit for candidates is not more than 40 years as on the date of the interview. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

content_sections.heading: ICMR NICPR Young Professional-III (F&A) Salary 2026
content_sections.text: Consolidated emoluments of Rs.50,000/- p.m. No House Rent Allowance (HRA) will be paid.

content_sections.heading: ICMR NICPR Young Professional-III (F&A) Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
ICMR NICPR Young Professional-III (F&A) Selection Process 2026
content_sections.text: Screening based on Google Form entries Walk-in Interview/Written Test (if more than 30 candidates) Interview/Personal Discussion

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 27-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of ICMR NICPR to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: ICMR NICPR Young Professional-III (F&A) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ICMR NICPR Young Professional-III (F&A) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form is 27th July 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the eligibility criteria for the Young Professional-III (F&A) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Com / MBA (with minimum 55% marks) or CA (Inter)/ICWA (Inter)/CS (Inter) along with a minimum of five years of post-qualification experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates is 40 years as of the interview date. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Young Professional-III (F&A) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated emolument of Rs. 50,000/- per month. No House Rent Allowance (HRA) will be provided.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Young Professional-III (F&A) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Young Professional-III (F&A) position in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is entirely online. Candidates need to register through the provided Google Form and appear for the walk-in interview.

faq.question: Q7. When is the walk-in interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled to be held on 31st July 2026. Candidates should report between 9:00 AM and 10:00 AM for registration and document verification.

faq.question: Q8. What documents are required for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must bring all original certificates and self-attested photocopies of their educational qualifications, experience, and other relevant documents to the interview.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the National Institute of Cancer Prevention and Research located?
faq.answer: The National Institute of Cancer Prevention and Research (ICMR NICPR) is located in NOIDA, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 201301.
